entities.description: As a subsection of '5底板设计注意事项', this section outlines the design considerations for the minimum system configuration, which is critical for the proper functioning of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the design of the essential components required for the basic operation of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, as discussed in section 5.1.

relations.description: The concept of '最小系统设计' is the primary topic of section 5.1.
